prompt: Create a full-body high-fashion editorial photograph of an elegant adult woman standing in a luxurious boutique hallway with glossy dark wooden floors, cream paneled walls, mirrors, warm pendant lights, and a navy blazer displayed on a mannequin to the left. She has shoulder-length voluminous curly warm brown hair held back with a white headband, wears drop earrings and a delicate necklace, and poses confidently with one hand lightly touching the wall while looking toward the camera. Her outfit is a refined business-luxe ensemble: a cropped gray tweed blazer over a white buttoned blouse tucked into a high-waisted glossy rich chocolate brown pencil skirt with white floral embroidery, finished with black pointed ankle-strap stiletto heels. Use realistic fabric textures, sharp tailoring, polished reflections, warm cinematic boutique lighting, shallow depth of field, vertical composition, and an upscale magazine fashion photography style. The face should be softly obscured or anonymized with a smooth neutral blur while preserving the hairstyle and overall pose.
